examples: Avian Coccidiosis is one of the high incidence Verminosis, which do harm to poultry industry.
The left-shell of Pteria penguin reared in cone cage was liable to infection of polychaete verminosis.
Ascariasis is common enteric verminosis, often in children, will influence children enteric function and growth, possibly with many complications; active and effective treatment is very important.
